title: BeyondMC SMP (discontinued)
description: This is the Modpack for our BeyondMC SMP. It's discontinued now.
body: **(This server is discontinued but if you want to read feel free)** Introducing the MrPack designed exclusively for our BeyondMC SMP! Our SMP boosts outstanding features, including a dedicated team of friendly staff, a robust server, and a captivating gameplay experience. As both drewthemodder and SuperZekes, we earnestly anticipate your enjoyment in exploring this SMP. With the inclusion of the Create mod and valuable stairs & slabs, coupled with a visually appealing spawn, we've build an experience like no other. While the server is currently offline, stay tuned here for updates on its online status. Your adventure awaits!
